overview.description: AI-powered recruitment platform automating interviews, candidate sourcing, and screening
overview.description_long: Instaview is an AI-powered hiring platform that deploys AI agents to conduct voice and chat interviews, source candidates across multiple job platforms, screen applicants, verify skills, and automate scheduling. Founded after experiencing the 'black hole' candidate experience in European hiring, the company focuses on EU AI Act compliance, GDPR readiness, and support for local European languages. It targets both large enterprises and SMEs with modular AI recruitment solutions.
overview.tagline: AI that interviews talents for you

history.origin_story: Founded in 2024 after the founders experienced frustration with the candidate 'black hole' in European hiring processes. Czech legal entity (Instaview s.r.o.) registered June 2025.

key_milestones.event: Czech legal entity (Instaview s.r.o.) registered in Prague, IČO 23398574

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Instaview is essentially a vertical application layer on top of foundation LLMs and voice AI — the core interview and screening capabilities are increasingly commoditized by general-purpose AI platforms (OpenAI Voice, Gemini, etc.) with no clear proprietary data moat disclosed. EU compliance focus provides some differentiation but is replicable.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI recruitment is a real and growing market in Europe, but it is crowded with well-funded competitors (HireVue, Paradox, Workday AI). Instaview's EU-first/GDPR angle and local language support provide niche differentiation, but the addressable market share is uncertain for a pre-seed startup.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding; Czech entity registered June 2025 with minimal share capital (10,000 CZK). Company appears to be bootstrapped and very early stage with limited runway signals.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Very early-stage startup (founded 2024, Czech entity mid-2025) with no disclosed funding, two co-founders, a commoditizing core technology, and strong incumbents in the HR AI market. High risk across all dimensions despite a real market need.

metadata.notes: Company founded 2024; Czech legal entity (Instaview s.r.o., IČO 23398574) registered June 17, 2025. Founders are Slovak nationals based in Prague. Website is instaview.sk (Slovak domain). COO role inferred from LinkedIn snippet; registry confirms Filip Ščepko (CEO) and Ľuboš Repka as co-founders with equal 50/50 ownership.
